name: Hawaiian Macadamia Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 can (20 oz.) crushed pineapple, well drained, reserving 1 cup syrup
1 jar (3 1/2 oz.) macadamia nuts, chopped (3/4 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, cream butter and sugar until fluffy. Beat in eggs.
3. Alternately add the flour mixture and pineapple juice to the butter mixture.
4. Fold in vanilla extract, coconut, macadamia nuts, and crushed pineapple.
5. Pour batter into a greased baking dish.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees for 55 to 60 minutes.
